_comment: Post-publish validation manifest. Defines expected custom fields per entity after a successful Acumatica customization publish. Used by validate-publish.py to verify fields exist in live API responses.

_notes.UsrDisablePayLink: CustomerExt : PXCacheExtension<Customer> field. Displayed on AR303000 Financial Settings tab (chkUsrDisablePayLink). Controls ARInvoiceEntry_PayLink_Extension Stripe payment link suppression. NOT exposed via REST API $adHocSchema for Customer entity — BAccount table column. Cannot validate via REST API schema check — only via sql_columns.
